title: Simultaneous Linear Equations (2 unknowns)
description: Solves Ax + By = C and Dx + Ey = F. The undisputed must-have programme for HKDSE Maths — solves any two-variable linear system in seconds.
descriptionZh: 解 Ax+By=C, Dx+Ey=F。HKDSE 數學必入第一名。
formula: x = (CE − BF) / (AE − BD),  y = (AF − CD) / (AE − BD)

setup.slotInstruction: Press 1, 2, 3, or 4 to choose an empty P1–P4 slot.
setup.notes: Runs in default COMP mode — no MODE setup needed after entering the programme.

inputs.label: A
inputs.description: Coefficient of x in equation 1 [方程 1 的 x 係數]

inputs.label: B
inputs.description: Coefficient of y in equation 1 [方程 1 的 y 係數]

inputs.label: C
inputs.description: Constant on RHS of equation 1 [方程 1 右側常數]

inputs.label: D
inputs.description: Coefficient of x in equation 2 [方程 2 的 x 係數]

inputs.label: E
inputs.description: Coefficient of y in equation 2 [方程 2 的 y 係數]

inputs.label: F
inputs.description: Constant on RHS of equation 2 [方程 2 右側常數]

displays.label: x
displays.meaning: First press of ◢ shows the value of x [◢ 第一次按顯示 x 的值]

displays.label: y
displays.meaning: Press EXE then ◢ again to display y [按 EXE 再按 ◢ 顯示 y]

errors.meaning: 方程平行 (AE − BD = 0) 無唯一解，或方程重合有無數解。[Equations are parallel (no unique solution) or identical (infinite solutions).]

paperHints: 紙 1 第 A 題常設二元題目（價格×數量、年齡/速度、混合物），用此程式驗證手寫的消元/代入答案。[Paper 1 Section A often features 2-variable problems (price×qty, age/speed, mixture) — verify manual elimination/substitution]
紙 2 MC：快速檢驗四個選項中哪個滿足方程組，毋須逐一代入。[Paper 2 MC: quickly check which option satisfies the system without expanding all four]
M1 / M2：常作大題中的子步驟（如求積分常數、多項式係數對比）。[M1/M2: sub-step in larger problems like solving for integration constants or equating polynomial coefficients]
dseRelevance.notes: 常見錯誤：常數項輸入時符號錯誤，或輸入到等式錯一邊。若手寫答案與程式不符，先檢查 A,B,C,D,E,F 的符號。[Most common mistake: keying the constant on wrong side of equals sign or getting signs wrong — recheck A,B,C,D,E,F]

title: Enhanced Quadratic Equation
description: Solves Ax² + Bx + C = 0 and additionally outputs the vertex coordinates, discriminant Δ, decimal roots, and the surd form p ± q√r when roots are irrational.
descriptionZh: 解二次方程 Ax²+Bx+C=0，同時輸出頂點、判別式、根（小數及根式）。

setup.notes: Uses Fix 0 mid-programme; the final Norm 1 restores the default display.

displays.label: Vertex x-coordinate (−B/2A)
displays.meaning: First ◢ shows the x-coord of the parabola's vertex [首個 ◢ 顯示拋物線頂點的 x 座標]

displays.label: Vertex y-coordinate
displays.meaning: Second ◢ shows y = C − A·(vertex_x)² [第二個 ◢ 顯示 y = C − A·(頂點 x)²]

displays.label: Discriminant Δ = B² − 4AC
displays.meaning: If negative: no real roots. If 0: one repeated root. If positive: two real roots. [負數：無實根；零：一個重根；正數：兩個實根]

displays.label: Root in surd form p ± q√r
displays.meaning: Only displayed when roots are irrational. Shows p, then q√r factor. [只在根為無理數時顯示，先顯示 p，再顯示 q√r 因子]

examples.question: Find the vertex and solve x² + 6x + 3 = 0.
examples.questionZh: 求方程 x²+6x+3=0 的頂點座標及解方程。

steps.note: surd: q = 1; with r = 6 ⇒ roots are −3 ± √6

examples.question: Find the number of roots for 3x² − 4x + 9 = 0.

errors.meaning: A = 0（非二次方程）或計算根號時 Δ < 0。[A = 0 (not a quadratic) or √ step reached Δ < 0]

paperHints: 紙 1 第 A 題：「求拋物線頂點座標及對稱軸」——直接套用本程式第 1、2 個 ◢ 輸出。[Paper 1 Section A: "find vertex coordinates and axis of symmetry" — output from display steps 1 & 2]
紙 1 第 B 題：「證明方程無實根 / 有兩個相異實根 / 有相等實根」——讀取判別式 Δ（第 3 個 ◢）。[Paper 1 Section B: "show equation has no real / two distinct / equal roots" — read Δ from display step 3]
紙 2 MC：「根為 p ± q√r，求 p+q+r」——根式形式輸出（第 6 步）直接給出 p 和 q。[Paper 2 MC: "roots are p±q√r, find p+q+r" — surd display gives p and q]
直角座標幾何：直線與拋物線求交點 → 一元二次方程——本程式完成求解。[Coordinate geometry: line-parabola intersections collapse to quadratic — this finishes the job]
dseRelevance.notes: 若 Δ < 0，計算機在根號步驟可能出現 Math ERROR——這本身就是答案：無實根。[If Δ < 0, Math ERROR at √ step is the answer itself: no real roots]

title: Cubic Equation Solver
description: Solves Ax³ + Bx² + Cx + D = 0 numerically using Cardano's method. Returns up to three roots (real or complex). Requires CMPLX mode.
descriptionZh: 解三次方程 Ax³+Bx²+Cx+D=0，使用 Cardano 法數值求解。可輸出實根或複數根。需於 CMPLX 模式執行。
formula: Cardano's method: depressed cubic substitution + trigonometric/complex root extraction

setup.slotInstruction: Pick an empty slot. Requires CMPLX mode — press 2 after selecting slot.
setup.notes: Does not fit on fx-3650P. Input integer/fraction coefficients for best accuracy [[11]].

displays.label: Root 1 (real)
displays.meaning: First ◢ shows the real root (always real) [[11]]

displays.label: Root 2 (real/complex)
displays.meaning: Second ◢ shows second root; if complex, use SHIFT Re⇔Im to view imaginary part

displays.label: Root 3 (real/complex)
displays.meaning: Final display shows third root; conjugate of root 2 if complex

errors.meaning: A = 0 (not cubic) or numerical instability with decimal coefficients.
errors.meaningZh: A = 0 (非三次方程) 或小數係數導致數值誤差。

paperHints: M2 紙 1：因式定理給出一個有理根後，用本程式驗證剩餘二次因子的根 [[26]]。[M2 Paper 1: After factor theorem gives one rational root, use to verify remaining quadratic roots]
核心課程：罕見直接題；更常用於驗證曲線描繪中的臨界點。[Core: Rare direct questions; more for verifying curve-sketching critical points]
提醒：必須展示手寫的求解過程以得分；程式只用於驗證 [[11]]。[Always show written method for marks; programme for verification only]
dseRelevance.notes: 第一個根永遠是實數。若為二次方程，輸入 D=0 並忽略 x=0 的根 [[11]]。[First root always real. For quadratic equations, input D=0 and ignore the x=0 root]

title: Circle from 3 Points
description: Given three points on a circle, outputs the equation x² + y² + Dx + Ey + F = 0, the centre (−D/2, −E/2), and radius.
descriptionZh: 輸入三點座標，輸出圓方程、圓心座標及半徑。
formula: Solve linear system from substituting points into x² + y² + Dx + Ey + F = 0

setup.slotInstruction: Press 1, 2, 3, or 4 to choose an empty P1–P4 slot.
setup.notes: If two points share the same y-coordinate, reorder input points to avoid Math ERROR [[16]].

errors.meaning: Two points share same y-coordinate; reorder input points [[16]].
errors.meaningZh: 有兩點 y 坐標相同，請更換輸入順序。

sources.label: Hoksi Resources — 三點求圓方程

paperHints: 核心紙 1 第 B 題：「已知三點求圓方程」直接套用此程式 [[26]]。[Core Paper 1 Section B: "Find circle equation given 3 points" — direct application]
紙 2 MC：用程式輸出驗證選項中的圓心/半徑是否吻合。[Paper 2 MC: use output to verify if option's centre/radius matches]
結合二元聯立程式求圓與直線的交點。[Combine with 2-var programme to find circle-line intersections]
topics: 圓的方程 [Equation of a circle]
dseRelevance.notes: 若輸入整數/分數，圓心及係數會以分數顯示；建議預先設定 SHIFT SETUP → 2（假分數模式） [[16]]。[If inputting integers/fractions, centre and coefficients display as fractions; recommend presetting SHIFT SETUP → 2 (improper fraction mode)]

title: Four Centres of Triangle
description: Given three vertices of a triangle, outputs Incenter, Centroid, Orthocenter, Circumcenter coordinates, circumradius, and the circumcircle equation (D, E, F). Requires REG-LIN mode.
descriptionZh: 輸入三角形三頂點座標，輸出內心、形心、垂心、外心、外接圓半徑及外接圓方程。
formula: Coordinate geometry formulas for all four centres + circumcircle

setup.notes: Must run in REG-LIN mode. Reorder points if two have the same y-coordinate to avoid Math ERROR.

displays.label: D
displays.meaning: D in x² + y² + Dx + Ey + F = 0

examples.question: Vertices (4,3), (0,0), (4,0)

steps.press: 4 EXE 3 EXE 0 EXE 0 EXE 4 EXE 0 EXE

examples.finalNote: Incenter (3,1), Centroid (8/3,1), Orthocenter (4,0), Circumcenter (2, 3/2), R=2.5, D=-4, E=-3, F=0

errors.meaning: Two points have the same y-coordinate. Reorder the input points.
errors.meaningZh: 兩點 y 座標相同，請重新排序輸入點

paperHints: Paper 1: Triangle centres and circumcircle questions — very common in coordinate geometry.
dseRelevance.notes: One of the most powerful geometry programmes for DSE Core Maths.

title: Circle Equation Properties
description: Given the general circle equation Ax² + Ay² + Bx + Cy + D = 0, outputs the centre coordinates (h, k) and radius r.
descriptionZh: 輸入圓的一般方程 Ax² + Ay² + Bx + Cy + D = 0，輸出圓心座標及半徑。

setup.notes: Usually A = 1. Works best in COMP mode with improper fraction setting (SHIFT SETUP → 2).

inputs.label: B
inputs.description: Coefficient of x (D in standard notation)

inputs.label: C
inputs.description: Coefficient of y (E in standard notation)

displays.label: Radius r
displays.meaning: Final display shows radius √(h² + k² − D/A)

examples.question: Find centre and radius of x² + y² + 4x + 8y − 44 = 0.
examples.questionZh: 求 x² + y² + 4x + 8y − 44 = 0 的圓心及半徑。

errors.meaning: A = 0 or negative value inside square root (not a circle).

sources.label: Mathit.hk — Equation of Circle 圓形方程 Program

paperHints: Paper 1: Given general circle equation, quickly find centre and radius.
Paper 2 MC: Verify circle properties without manual calculation.
dseRelevance.notes: This is an essential lightweight programme for all circle-related questions.

title: Enhanced Quadratic Equation
description: Solves Ax² + Bx + C = 0 and additionally outputs the vertex coordinates, discriminant Δ, decimal roots, and the surd form p ± q√r when roots are irrational.
descriptionZh: 解二次方程 Ax²+Bx+C=0，同時輸出頂點、判別式、根（小數及根式）。

setup.notes: Uses Fix 0 mid-programme; the final Norm 1 restores the default display.

displays.label: Surd form p
displays.meaning: Then p for p ± q√r (when irrational)

errors.meaning: A = 0 (not quadratic) or Δ < 0 at square root step.

paperHints: Paper 1: Vertex coordinates, axis of symmetry, discriminant questions, surd form in MC.
dseRelevance.notes: Set to improper fraction mode for best results.

title: Variance & Standard Deviation
description: Computes mean, σ (population SD), s (sample SD), and variance from a list of data entered with frequencies. Wraps the SD-mode workflow into a single programme.
descriptionZh: 計算平均數、母體標準差 σ、樣本標準差 s、方差。

setup.notes: Before running, the calculator must be in SD mode (MODE 4 1). The programme handles ClrStat + FreqOn automatically.

inputs.label: Data value xᵢ
inputs.description: The data point you want to add [要輸入的數據點]

inputs.label: Frequency fᵢ
inputs.description: How many times xᵢ occurs (use 1 for ungrouped data) [數據點出現次數；無分組時用 1]

displays.label: Pause after each entry
displays.meaning: After each x, freq pair, the ◢ pauses so you can press EXE to re-enter the loop and add more data. [每個 x、頻率對後暫停，按 EXE 可回到循環輸入更多數據]

displays.label: After all data: SHIFT 2 →
displays.meaning: Use SHIFT 2 menu to read x̄ (mean), σn (pop SD), σn-1 (sample SD). [按 SHIFT 2 查看平均數 x̄、母體 SD σn、樣本 SD σn-1]

examples.question: Find the mean and SD of {2, 4, 4, 4, 5, 5, 7, 9}.
examples.finalNote: Square σn to get population variance = 4.

errors.meaning: 計算機未進入 SD 模式。先按 MODE 4 1。[Calculator is not in SD mode. Press MODE 4 1 first.]
errors.meaningZh: 未在 SD 模式中執行程式

paperHints: M1 紙 2 統計題：分組數據的平均數、方差、標準差每年必出——本程式可直接處理頻率列。[M1 Paper 2 Stats: grouped data mean, variance, SD every year — programme handles frequency column directly]
核心紙 1 第 A 題：「求下列數據集的標準差...」——立即驗證。[Core Paper 1 Section A: "find standard deviation of data set..." — instant verification]
用途：計算變異係數 (CV = σ/x̄) 時，同時讀取兩個值，毋須重新輸入數據。[Handy for coefficient of variation (CV = σ/x̄) — read both values without re-entering data]

title: Polar ↔ Rectangular Converter
titleZh: 極座標 / 直角座標互換
description: Convert between (x, y) and (r, θ) representations. Useful for M1 polar curves and M2 complex-number arithmetic.
formula: Pol(x, y) → (r, θ);  Rec(r, θ) → (x, y)

setup.notes: Make sure angle mode (DEG or RAD) matches the question before running. Toggle with MODE MODE 4 1 (DEG) or 4 2 (RAD).

displays.label: r
displays.meaning: Radius = √(x² + y²). Stored automatically into X. [半徑 = √(x² + y²)，自動存入 X]

displays.label: θ
displays.meaning: Angle. Stored automatically into Y. Unit depends on current angle mode. [角度，自動存入 Y。單位依目前模式（DEG/RAD）]

paperHints: M2 紙 1 複數：將 a + bi 轉換成模-幅角形式 r(cosθ + i sinθ) 時用 Pol(a, b)。[M2 Paper 1 complex numbers: convert a+bi to modulus-argument form r(cosθ + i sinθ) via Pol(a,b)]
M1 / M2：極座標曲線 r = f(θ)——描繪前先驗證關鍵點座標。[M1/M2: polar curves r = f(θ) — sanity-check key points before sketching]
核心課程：向量大小/方向題通常歸納為 (x, y) → (r, θ) 轉換。[Core: vector magnitude/direction problems reduce to (x, y) → (r, θ)]

title: Log Linear Transformation
description: Fits y = a·bˣ or y = a·xᵇ to two data points via REG-LIN. Outputs a and b for the curve. Common M1 exponential/log model question.
descriptionZh: 對數線性回歸：擬合 y=a·bˣ 或 y=a·xᵇ。
formula: Take logs to linearise, fit straight line through 2 points.

setup.notes: Must run in REG (Linear) mode. Press MODE 5 1 before invoking Prog.

inputs.label: A
inputs.description: Base of log on x-axis; enter 0 if x-axis is plain x [x 軸對數底；若 x 軸為純 x 則輸入 0]

inputs.label: B
inputs.description: Base of log on y-axis (e.g. 10 for log₁₀, e for ln) [y 軸對數底，如 10 代表 log₁₀、e 代表 ln]

displays.label: Case A: y = a·bˣ
displays.meaning: When A = 0 (x-axis is plain x): outputs a then b. [A = 0 時（x 軸為純 x），先輸出 a 再輸出 b]

displays.label: Case B: y = a·xᵇ
displays.meaning: When A ≠ 0 (x-axis is logₐx): outputs a then b. [A ≠ 0 時（x 軸為 logₐx），先輸出 a 再輸出 b]

examples.question: log₁₀y against x passes through (3, 0) and (0, 1). Find y = a·bˣ.

paperHints: M1 紙 2：指數/冪律模型題。「log y 對 x 的圖像為直線，經過 (0, 1) 及 (3, 0)——求 y 與 x 的關係。」——本程式正是為此設計。[M1 Paper 2: exponential/power-law models. "Graph of log y vs x is a straight line through (0,1) and (3,0) — find y in terms of x." This is exactly this programme's purpose]
情況 1 (log y vs x → y = a·bˣ) 和情況 2 (log y vs log x → y = a·xᵇ) 都是 DSE 常見模式。[Both Case 1 (log y vs x → y=a·bˣ) and Case 2 (log y vs log x → y=a·xᵇ) are DSE standard patterns]
適用於生物/流行病學類型的增長衰減題，改編成 M1 題。[Useful for biology-inspired growth/decay problems adapted into M1 questions]
topics: 指數與對數函數 [Exponential & logarithmic functions]
dseRelevance.notes: 執行程式前必須進入 REG-LIN 模式；程式自動執行 ClrStat 清除舊數據。[Must be in REG-LIN mode before invoking; programme calls ClrStat so prior data is wiped]
